title: Clients go Bubbles about our laundry services!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We want to express our...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We want to express our deepest gratitude to all of our amazing customers who have supported us over the years and who loyally continue to support us. Thank you for voting for Bubbles Laundry and for letting us be part of your lives - it's been a privilege to serve you.


> As a small family-owned business, we are bubbling over with excitement about the honour of receiving this recognition for the second year running!


We’re especially proud of Dolphina Makela, the heart and soul of Bubbles. She’s been with us since day one, and her passion, commitment, and work ethic continue to inspire us every single day.

Truly, this achievement would not have been possible without her.

Our mission is to always deliver the highest level of service to our valued customers, and we believe that her dedication has played a big part in earning us this award once again.

A big thank you also to our suppliers and service providers for being such integral partners in our journey.

We look forward to continuing serving our community for years to come.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
